privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world statistics from the standard MySQL 'world' sample database (239 countries). The setup script generates an import CSV file with >200 rows at '/home/ga/Documents/imports/country_indicators.csv'. The expected target database is 'world_analytics' containing a 'country_indicators' table. The agent must create two SQL functions, 'fn_development_level' and 'fn_density_category', and export a view combining them to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/country_analysis.csv'. All metadata claims align perfectly with the task description, setup scripts, and verification logic.
